title: Pelagic Phase 3 curation claim: late-named-peer comms reconciliation home
body: Pelagic 019e5b opened claim d3b9749f for a narrow Phase 3 curation slice: home the distilled named-peer-arrives-late/all-channel reconciliation lesson into start-right-team singleton-lane discipline, then record disposition in distilled log, current plan, and napkin. No staging or commit; commit lane remains Mistbound-owned.
